title: next.config.ts unsupported in Next.js 14
body: Next.js 14 ignores next.config.ts — must use next.config.mjs. TSC parses .ts fine but Next silently uses defaults. Always use .mjs for next.config.

title: test.todo() not in Playwright TypeScript types
body: Playwright's TypeScript types do not include test.todo(). Use test('description', async () => {}) with an empty body instead for placeholder E2E tests.

title: Coverage includes scripts/ at 0% unless excluded
body: vitest picks up scripts/migrate.ts and scripts/seed.ts unless explicitly scoped. Use include: ['src/**'] in vitest.config.ts coverage config to prevent 0% scripts from dragging down thresholds.

title: DB provider stubs required for build
body: src/lib/db/index.ts references ./providers/pg, ./providers/supabase, ./providers/neon. All three stubs must exist even if unimplemented or the build fails with module not found.

title: PowerShell && not supported
body: PowerShell does not support && for command chaining. Use separate statements or the Bash tool. Also, route groups like (dashboard) and (auth) must be quoted in git commands to prevent PowerShell treating () as subexpression: git add "src/app/(auth)/"

title: Async Server Component unit tests need await + render pattern
body: DashboardLayout is an async Server Component that calls getServerSession. Testing in JSDOM with render(<DashboardLayout>) fails with 'Objects are not valid as React child (found: Promise)'. Fix: const jsx = await DashboardLayout({children}); render(jsx); Must also mock next-auth/next, next/navigation redirect, and shell children.

title: cmdk (shadcn Command) requires jsdom polyfills in tests
body: Tests using OwnerSelect or any shadcn Command+Popover combo must stub ResizeObserver and scrollIntoView in beforeAll — cmdk uses both internally and they are absent in jsdom. Add: global.ResizeObserver = class { observe(){} unobserve(){} disconnect(){} }; window.HTMLElement.prototype.scrollIntoView = () => {};

title: cn() is in src/lib/utils.ts, not src/lib/utils/
body: New utility files go in src/lib/utils/ (activity.ts, format.ts) but the cn() merge helper stays at src/lib/utils.ts. Always import cn as '@/lib/utils', not '@/lib/utils/cn'. Do not create a cn.ts in the utils/ subdirectory.
